benefits.description: SS-31 initially caused tiredness that resolved after a few weeks of regular use

side_effects.description: Accidental overdose of DSIP caused severe tiredness and exhaustion within 30-60 minutes; user was unable to function for evening activities

protocol_notes: User takes SS-31 2mg in the mornings. Accidentally dosed with an older bottle (approximately 1 year old) containing DSIP instead of SS-31 at 8am. Reports improvement in symptoms over time but still experiencing fatigue several hours post-exposure.
